sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66673" key="metaiboli/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταιβολία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n66673.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">change of mind</tr_>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:37:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
